name: Nathan Smith
focus: Mission operations • Spectral data pipelines • Planetary data analysis
bio: Nathan Smith is a Senior Program Coordinator at Northern Arizona University, working within the Planetary Instrumentation eXperimentation and Exploration Laboratory (PIXEL) under Dr. Christopher Edwards. His role supports research operations and data-focused projects related to planetary science and remote sensing. Smith has been involved in developing data processing pipelines for infrared spectral data collected from Mars, contributing to the creation of high-level scientific data products used in planetary research. He also has experience supporting observational planning and data analysis for planetary missions, including work related to lunar and Mars observations. Through his work, Smith helps bridge technical data processing with mission-driven scientific objectives, supporting ongoing research in planetary surface composition and infrared spectroscopy.
